summary: Completed frontend testing of THRESHOLD PWA. Registration and authentication work correctly, but critical issues found in assessment flow and commitment completion that prevent full user journey.

critical_bugs.issue: Answer options are not clickable - elements show as 'not enabled'
critical_bugs.impact: Users cannot complete the 15-question assessment, blocking the entire onboarding flow

critical_bugs.issue: START MY 30 DAYS button doesn't complete onboarding - onboarding_complete flag not set
critical_bugs.impact: Users cannot reach dashboard after completing commitment, stuck in onboarding loop

ui_bugs.issue: Assessment flow cycles back to welcome page instead of progressing

integration_issues.issue: Cannot complete full flow from welcome to dashboard due to assessment and commitment bugs

passed_tests: Welcome page loads with BEGIN ASSESSMENT button
Login page displays correctly with form validation
Commitment flow displays both steps correctly
Protected routes redirect to commitment when onboarding incomplete
Framing pages display and navigate correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical assessment interaction bug - answer options need proper click handlers. Fix commitment completion to set onboarding_complete=true. These are blocking the entire user journey.
